sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89068" key="prosemfore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεμ-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n89068.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put in</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">into in addition</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὑτῷ δείματα καὶ φόβους</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.168a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">547c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
